NFA2 V1.3

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 747
Recv ID: 767
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 58
Func Name: Navigation

[
  {
    "diagversion": "72",
    "supplier": "329",
    "soft": "3CFF",
    "version": "3CFF"
